blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
